creator: ceri@FreeBSD.org
text:
Everyone in the documentation project is aware that the install chapter
needs work.  This PR documents that as a task.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Everything in the message at
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2006-December/031756.html
should be fixed, screenshots need to be updated, and so on.
